subcodes.first_line: O my God! All praise be unto Thee for having given the yearning ones to drink from the crimson wine of fidelity and quickened the hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی لک الحمد بما سقیت المشتاقین من صهباء الولاء و انعشت قلوب
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom
